article_title: .NET Keyed Services：一个接口多实现时的依赖注入方案
core_theme: 用 .NET 8 的 Keyed Services 替代手写工厂 switch，通过 AddKeyedScoped、FromKeyedServices 和运行时动态解析实现干净的策略模式
reader_takeaway: 学会用键控 DI 注册和解析同一接口的多个实现，在编译期已知 key 和运行时动态 key 两种场景下去掉工厂样板代码
summary_angle: 从手写 switch 工厂到 DI 容器原生键控查找的简化路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「The Switch Statement」节：每加一个实现要改 factory 里的 switch 和注册两个地方
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧一个带有易碎 switch 分支的工厂盒子

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文键控注册和 FromKeyedServices 解析方式
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央 DI 容器，按 key（email/sms/push）分发不同实现

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文三种解析方式：属性注入、运行时动态解析、AnyKey 广播
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧三个消费端：固定 key 用属性、动态 key 用 Provider、全量广播

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文「Wrapping Up」节：容器本身成为查询表
information_blocks.visible_idea: 一个干净容器输出正确实现的流程

main_metaphor: DI 容器作为键控分发中心：接口是类型，key 是标签，容器按标签匹配把正确的实现送给消费端
primary_subject: 一个中心化的 DI 容器/分发器，按 key 标签（email/sms/push）输出不同的 INotificationSender 实现
subject_action: 容器正在按 key 标签分发正确的实现到不同的消费端
composition: 左到右：工厂 switch（问题）→ 容器键控分发（机制）→ 三种消费端（结果）
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从 40 项风格池随机选中（#29）；游戏原画的清晰主体和抛光光照适合表现 DI 容器作为中心实体分发的结构化关系
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证容器键控分发和三种消费端的结构可读性
revision_targets: key 标签的视觉辨识度
游戏原画风格与架构主题的融合
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: .NET Keyed Services — replacing factory switches with keyed DI lookups. Summary angle: From hand-written switch factories to container-native keyed resolution. Narrative flow: before-after. Information blocks: Problem — factory box with fragile switch branches on the left. Mechanism — central DI container distributing different implementations by key labels (email/sms/push) in the center. Step — three consumer endpoints on the right receiving implementations via attribute, provider, and broadcast. Takeaway — clean container as the only lookup table. Main metaphor: A DI container as a keyed distribution center routing tagged implementations to consumers. Subject: A central container/distributor routing implementations by key tags. Composition: Left factory problem → center keyed container → right three resolution patterns. Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with game concept art, clear hero object, polished lighting, production-art detail. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist. Color palette: deep indigo, warm gold, tech cyan, muted gray. No poster title, no fake UI, no fake terminals, no fake architecture labels.
